journeys.title: Organization Setup
journeys.subtitle: Create org, roles & users
journeys.narration: Setting up the organization, creating roles for team members, and onboarding users onto the platform.

journeys.title: Product Configuration
journeys.subtitle: PCG4 8-step wizard
journeys.narration: Configuring the health insurance product using the PCG4 eight-step wizard. We define insurer details, plans, encounters, benefits, and publish.

journeys.title: Product Pricing
journeys.subtitle: Rate tables & premium lookup
journeys.narration: Reviewing the rate tables imported from the product rate card, covering regional networks with age and gender-based pricing.

journeys.title: Health Insurance Application
journeys.subtitle: UAE quotation with PII protection
journeys.narration: Creating a new UAE health insurance application. We fill in proposer details, add family members, and submit for underwriting.

journeys.title: Underwriting Workflow
journeys.subtitle: Queue routing, approve & issue policy
journeys.narration: The underwriting workflow. Finding the application in the queue, approving it, generating the payment link, and issuing the policy certificate.

journeys.title: HI UW AE Decisioning
journeys.subtitle: Automated rules & STP evaluation
journeys.narration: Reviewing the AI decisioning engine. Automated rules evaluate applications for straight-through processing or manual review.

journeys.title: Policy Issuance
journeys.subtitle: Certificate verification & PDF download
journeys.narration: Finally, verifying the issued policy. The certificate is generated as a professional PDF document, ready for the policyholder.

journeys.title: Prospect Portal
journeys.subtitle: Get a health insurance quote online
journeys.narration: The Prospect Portal. A customer visits the landing page, verifies their identity via phone OTP, fills out an application with proposer details, selects a plan, and receives an instant premium quote.

journeys.title: Customer Portal
journeys.subtitle: Policy holder self-service dashboard
journeys.narration: The Customer Portal. A policyholder logs in via phone OTP, selects a family profile, views the dashboard with policy details and quick actions, checks policy coverage, and switches between family member profiles.
